events.name: Golden State Warriors at Orlando Magic

headlines.description: — Desmond Bane had 23 points and five steals, Anthony Black came off the bench to score 21 points, and the Orlando Magic beat the Golden State Warriors 121-113 on Tuesday night.

headlines.description: — Jaylen Brown scored 29 points, Payton Pritchard had 22 points and 10 rebounds, and the Boston Celtics beat the Brooklyn Nets 113-99 on Tuesday night to move above .500 for the first time this season.
headlines.shortLinkText: Brown, Celtics beat the Nets 113-99 to move above .500 for the first time this season

headlines.description: — Cade Cunningham returned from injury with 25 points and 10 assists as the Detroit Pistons won their 11th straight game, 120-112 over the short-handed Atlanta Hawks on Tuesday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Pistons win 11th straight for their longest streak in 18 years, 120-112 over short-handed Hawks

events.name: Memphis Grizzlies at San Antonio Spurs

headlines.description: — De’Aaron Fox had 26 points, Harrison Barnes added 23 points and the San Antonio Spurs escaped with a 111-101 victory over the Memphis Grizzlies on Tuesday night in a battle of injury-riddled rosters.
headlines.shortLinkText: Fox, Barnes lead Spurs past Grizzlies 111-101 in a battle without stars Wembanyama, Morant

headlines.description: — LeBron James had 11 points and 12 assists in the first game of his unprecedented 23rd NBA season, and Luka Doncic had 37 points and 10 assists in the Los Angeles Lakers' 140-126 victory over the Utah Jazz on Tuesday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: LeBron James makes historic season debut, Luka Doncic scores 37 in Lakers' 140-126 win over Jazz

events.name: Phoenix Suns at Portland Trail Blazers

headlines.description: — Devin Booker scored 19 points and the Phoenix Suns pulled away in the second half for a 127-110 victory over the Portland Trail Blazers on Tuesday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Booker scores 19 as the Suns down the Trail Blazers 127-110
